creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
Ding Ding tram ride in Hong Kong 🇭🇰 Places to discover in Hong Kong⬇️

⛵️1.Tsim Sha Tsui (discover this vibrant area by taking a Star Ferry from Central)
🏮2.Wong Tai Sin Temple (a must-visit stunning cultural landmark)
🍃3.Nan Lian Garden (a peaceful garden with traditional design)
🌸4.Chi Lin Nunnery (a remarkable structure with unique architecture)
🏙️5.Harbour City (popular shopping and entertainment complex, don’t miss Ohayo by Ocio cafe)
🏮6.Man Mo Temple (one of Hong Kong’s oldest and most respected temples)
🧑‍🍳7.Duddell’s restaurant (Michelin-starred restaurant offering Cantonese dishes, one of Cathay Pacific’s partners) 
↕️8.Longest escalator in the world (Central–Mid-Levels Escalator)
🥪9.Local cafes including Lan Fong Yuen (must try pineapples buns, toasts and milk tea) & Latter Cafe (really enjoyed the purple sweet potato latte)
🚃”Ding Ding” (iconic Hong Kong tram system)

🗺️🎁When visiting Hong Kong you can get 10% off on experiences on Klook.com with the code TRAVELOFFER

Exploring Hong Kong with @cathaypacific✈️

#Travel #HongKong #thingstodoinhongkong #asia @discoverhongkong
